meaning: n.(尤指被看作神一般的宗教领袖的)日本国天皇
examples: This week we take a statistics-focused look at weapons in the Tenno Arsenal.
So, which enemies rank as the most group-minded, co-operative foes likely to gang-up on and defeat poor Tenno?
But to create the ultimate compendium of knowledge on the Corpus' most dangerous weapon Tenno may need to lend a hand.
